nav.helpDescription: Check the documentation for guides and tutorials.

wallet.unlockDescription: Sign a message with your wallet to decrypt your private invoice data.
wallet.connectPrompt: Please connect your wallet to continue.

create.title: Create Invoice
create.subtitle: Fill in the details to create a new JCT-compliant invoice
create.arbiterHint: If set, the buyer can use Escrow Pay with this arbiter to handle disputes. Leave empty to disable escrow.
create.tNumberHint: 13-digit registration number (T+13). Required for JCT-compliant invoices.
create.formatValid: Format valid. For official verification, confirm with NTA or use the check below.
create.ntaDemoNote: For demo purposes, any 13-digit value is accepted. Configure NTA API in production for official verification.
create.currencyNote: Invoice can be paid in Credits or USDCx only.
create.auditKeyHint: Click the icon to generate. Store it securely; share only with the auditor.
create.pageDescription: Data is encrypted locally before on-chain commitment

detail.title: Invoice Detail
detail.processingOnChain: This invoice may still be processing on the blockchain. Please try again later.
detail.auditPackageRequiresDetails: Audit package download requires locally stored invoice details.
detail.notBuyerOrSeller: You are not the buyer or seller of this invoice.
detail.statusResolvedCancelledMessage: Dispute dismissed — escrow remains active, buyer can confirm delivery
detail.statusResolvedPaidMessage: Dispute upheld — funds refunded to buyer
detail.arbiterNotSet: Arbiter not set — Escrow Pay unavailable
detail.arbiterSetBySeller: Arbiter set by seller. You may review before paying.

list.title: Invoices
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by invoice ID or address...
list.emptyDescription: Create your first invoice to get started.

progress.phase1Desc: Loading token records and freeze-list proofs
progress.phase2Desc: Generating zero-knowledge proof locally, do not close the browser
progress.loadingToken: Loading USDCx Token record & freeze-list proofs…
progress.noToken: No USDCx Token record found in wallet

success.title: Payment Successful
success.description: Your payment has been submitted and is awaiting chain confirmation.

receipt.title: Receipts
receipt.emptyDescription: Payment receipts will appear here after you pay an invoice.
receipt.description: View payment receipts and transaction history

center.title: Audit Center
center.authorizeAccess: Authorize to access local invoice and receipt data
center.generateDescription: Choose your role, select records, set expiry, then generate a JSON package and Audit Key for the auditor.
center.noRecords: No records. Sync invoices and payments first.
center.tNumber: T number (optional, for auditor identity hint)
center.description: Select an invoice from your local list (including chain-synced invoices without nonce), then generate an audit package and key for selective disclosure to auditors.

verify.title: Verify Audit Package
verify.pastePlaceholder: Paste or upload audit package JSON (envelope format)...
verify.auditKeyDesc: The 64-character hex key provided by the invoice owner (separately from the package).
verify.pageDescription: Upload or paste the audit package JSON and Audit Key, then preview disclosed content (decrypt only) or run full four-phase trustless verification (pre-check, on-chain access control, chain anchoring, and mathematical proof).
verify.linkDescription: Paste the package JSON and Audit Key on the verify page to preview disclosed content or run full verification.

generator.authDescription: Please authorize to decrypt local invoice data
generator.authDetail: Generating audit packages requires decrypting local invoice details. Please complete signature authorization first.
generator.title: Generate Audit Package
generator.selectOrPaste: Select or paste an invoice ID
generator.pasteInvoiceId: Or paste invoice ID / invoice hash
generator.auditKey: Audit Key (give to auditor; keep private)
generator.submitNote: Required for Phase 3 verification. Submits audit_key_hash and scopes to the contract.

dispute.title: Disputes
dispute.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for this dispute...
dispute.arbiterFromEscrow: Arbiter is inherited from the escrow payment and cannot be changed.
dispute.confirmRaise: Confirm: Raising a dispute will change the invoice status to DISPUTED. The invoice cannot be paid or cancelled until the dispute is resolved.
dispute.emptyDescription: No disputes have been raised yet.
dispute.dismissedCancelled: Dismissed — Buyer's appeal rejected, escrow active
dispute.arbitrationPendingDesc: Click to view disputes that need your resolution.
dispute.noArbitrationPendingDesc: No disputes currently require your arbitration.
dispute.resolveArbiterDesc: As the designated arbiter, you can dismiss the buyer's appeal (escrow remains active) or uphold it (funds refunded to buyer).
dispute.errorInvoiceNotFound: Cannot resolve: the related invoice was not found locally. Ensure invoices are synced.
dispute.errorNotArbiter: Only the designated arbiter can resolve this dispute.
dispute.waitingForArbiter: This dispute is awaiting the arbiter's decision. Only the arbiter can resolve it.
dispute.resolveUpheldSuccess: Dispute upheld — funds refunded to buyer
dispute.resolveDismissedSuccess: Dispute dismissed — escrow remains active, buyer can confirm delivery
dispute.resolveStep1Failed: Failed to record ruling on chain
dispute.resolveStep2Failed: Ruling recorded but refund failed. Please use the escrow page to manually refund.
dispute.dismissedExplanation: The buyer's appeal was rejected. The escrow is still active — the buyer can confirm delivery or funds will be released after the deadline.
dispute.upheldExplanation: The buyer's appeal was upheld. Funds have been refunded to the buyer and the invoice is cancelled.

escrow.confirmDeliveryMsg: Once confirmed, funds will be released to the seller immediately. This action cannot be undone.
escrow.refundAvailable: Delivery deadline has passed. You can claim a refund.
escrow.lockedSuccess: Payment locked in escrow — confirmed on chain
escrow.lockPaymentHint: Lock funds in escrow until delivery is confirmed
escrow.sellerWaiting: Waiting for the buyer to confirm delivery. Once confirmed, funds will be released to you automatically.
escrow.sellerReadonly: Funds are locked in escrow, awaiting buyer confirmation.
escrow.sellerExpiredWarning: Delivery deadline has passed. The buyer may request a refund for the escrowed funds.
escrow.contactArbiter: If you have a dispute, contact the arbiter to resolve. The arbiter can release funds or initiate a refund at any time.
escrow.arbiterCanResolve: The arbiter can confirm delivery or process a refund on behalf of either party.
escrow.refundNotYetAvailable: Refund is only available after the delivery deadline has passed.
escrow.arbiterRoleDesc: You can resolve this escrow at any time — release funds to the seller or refund the buyer. No timeout restriction applies to your decision.
escrow.resolvedPaidMessage: Dispute upheld — funds have been refunded to the buyer. This invoice is settled and no further actions are available.
escrow.resolvedCancelledMessage: Dispute dismissed — the buyer's appeal was rejected. The escrow remains active and the buyer can still confirm delivery or wait for the deadline.
escrow.sellerDisputeDismissed: The buyer's dispute was dismissed. Waiting for the buyer to confirm delivery or for the deadline to pass.

credit.title: Credit Proof
credit.shareProof: Share this proof code with your business partners for verification.
credit.shareProofCode: Copy this proof code and send it to your counterparty. They can paste it into the Verify section to see your claim details and verify it on-chain.
credit.verifiedWithClaim: This credit claim has been verified on the Fhenix network. The prover meets the stated threshold.
credit.expiredExplain: This proof was valid but has expired. Ask the prover to generate a new one.
credit.rawTxWarning: Only a raw Transaction ID was provided. For full claim details (type, threshold, expiry), ask the prover to share their Proof Code instead.
credit.verifyDescription: Paste a Proof Code or Transaction ID (0x...) from your counterparty to verify their credit claim on-chain.
credit.walletTrackingIdNote: Wallet tracking ID shown. The on-chain transaction ID (0x...) may take ~30s to resolve. Check your wallet activity for the chain transaction.
credit.verifyInput: Paste Proof Code or Transaction ID (0x...)
credit.valid: This credit claim has been verified via ZK proof.
credit.collectDescription: Scan your local invoice and payment records to compute credit metrics.
credit.dashboardDescription: Generate ZK credit proofs based on your transaction history.
credit.zkBannerSubtitle: Prove your credit history without revealing any invoice details
credit.zkPrivacyDesc: Raw invoice data never leaves your device
credit.zkOnChainDesc: Anyone can independently verify on the Fhenix network
credit.zkUnforgeableDesc: Mathematically guaranteed by ZK proof — impossible to fake
credit.noDataYet: No transaction data yet. Collect metrics or load demo data to get started.
credit.demoLoaded: Demo data loaded (for demonstration only, does not affect on-chain operations)
credit.gradeExplain: Weighted score across 5 dimensions, provable on-chain via ZK proof

settings.title: Settings
settings.noAuthFound: No authorization found for this invoice.
settings.authSubmitted: Authorization submitted. Wait for chain confirmation.

errors.walletNotInstalled: Wallet extension not detected. Please install and refresh
errors.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to wallet. Please confirm authorization
errors.networkMismatch: Please switch to the correct network in your wallet
errors.transactionFailed: Transaction execution failed. Please try again
errors.proofFailed: ZK proof generation failed. Please try again
errors.broadcastFailed: Failed to broadcast transaction. Check network connection
errors.invoiceNotFound: The specified invoice was not found
errors.alreadyPaid: This invoice has already been paid
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Check your connection
errors.decryptionFailed: Unable to decrypt data. Check your private key
errors.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again
errors.addressFrozen: One of the addresses is on the freeze list
errors.escrowFailed: Failed to process the escrow operation
errors.creditProofFailed: Failed to generate or verify the credit proof

onboarding.step1Desc: Connect your wallet to start using the app.
onboarding.step2Desc: Sign a message to decrypt your private invoice data.
onboarding.step3Desc: Create a JCT-compliant invoice in seconds.

tour.walletDesc: Click this button to connect your wallet. This is the first step to use Alpaca Invoice.
tour.dashboardDesc: This is your Quick Actions panel. You can create invoices, check pending items, view receipts, or jump to the Audit Center.
tour.createDesc: Fill in the buyer address, add line items and a due date, then submit. The data is encrypted locally before the on-chain commitment.
tour.invoicesDesc: All your invoices are here. Filter by status or role, sync on-chain data, export CSV, and click any card for details — pay, cancel, or generate audit packages.
tour.auditDesc: Generate a ZK audit package with selective disclosure, then use the Verify page to let auditors check data integrity without seeing private details.

hero.title: Privacy-Preserving B2B Invoice System
hero.subtitle: Built for confidential settlement and selective disclosure on the FHE stack
hero.poweredByAleo: Powered by FHE execution and relayer-backed integrity
hero.bodyText: Competitors are mapping your supply chain via public settlement data. Shield your procurement DNA with confidential execution and keep your trade terms private.

why.description: Standard blockchain transfers are a gift to corporate spies. Your unit costs, vendor lists, and trade secrets are being scraped in real-time.
why.item1Desc: Protect your supplier network from external prying eyes.
why.item2Desc: Use confidential settlement rails and bridge paths without exposing the commercial payload to the public market.
why.item3Desc: Encrypted record management ensures data only shared with counterparties.

features.unfairAdvantageSubtitle: Why 1% of the top traders are switching
features.whatIsSubtitle: Beyond simple payments — A privacy-first trading infrastructure
features.zkRecordBenefitDesc: Outsiders only see a string of hashes. Only you and your counterparty can decrypt transaction amounts and specific line items. Your profit margins remain a trade secret.
features.atomicDesc: Payment and invoice status updates occur simultaneously. No more "funds sent but no receipt" disputes.
features.selectiveDisclosureDesc: Generate specific "View Keys" for auditors or tax authorities without making your entire history public.

howItWorks.subtitle: Encrypted from issuance to settlement
howItWorks.step1Desc: Seller creates a private invoice request. Business fields remain readable in product UI while confidential inputs are prepared for secure execution.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Buyer settles through the confidential execution path or approved bridge mode. The receipt remains linked to the invoice lifecycle.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Both parties retain private proof of settlement while auditors and operators only receive the disclosure surface they are allowed to inspect.

cta.securedBy: Secured by FHE confidentiality and relayer policy enforcement

footer.copyright: © 2024 Alpaca Invoice. The confidential standard for private B2B settlement.

chatbot.presetQ2: How do I create an invoice?
chatbot.presetQ3: How does the audit system work?
chatbot.greetingSub: Ask me anything about Alpaca Invoice
chatbot.poweredBy: Powered by DeepSeek · Alpaca Invoice AI

verify.title: Verify Invoice (Walletless)
verify.description: Enter an invoice_id to check its on-chain status without connecting a wallet.
verify.rulesDescription: Chain anchor for R1–R5 verification rules

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Learn about the architecture, workflows, and how to use Alpaca Invoice
docs.architectureDesc: Technical architecture overview including the 4-layer design, data flow, smart contracts, and storage strategy.
docs.businessFlowDesc: Complete business logic flows covering invoice creation, payment processing, cancellation, and audit workflows.
docs.handbookDesc: Quick start guide, step-by-step instructions, important notes, and frequently asked questions.

createInvoice.returns: 2 InvoiceRecords (one for seller, one for buyer)

payInvoice.note: Credits transfer to seller in same tx or prior; currency_flag must be Credits

jctPreview.title: JCT Qualified Invoice (Preview)
jctPreview.disclaimer: This invoice qualifies as a qualified invoice under the JCT system. ※ indicates items subject to the reduced tax rate. Please contact the issuer if you have any questions regarding the transaction.

walletProgress.zkProvingDesc: Wallet is generating a zero-knowledge proof. This may take a moment — do not close the page.
walletProgress.confirmingOnChainDesc: Transaction submitted to network. Polling for confirmation every ~12 s.
walletProgress.timeoutDesc: The transaction may have been rejected on-chain. Please check the explorer or try again.
